title: Head Spa Therapist
description:
Job Description: TTE Elephant Headspa Therapist

Brand: TTE Elephant
Position: Headspa Therapist / Scalp Care Specialist

About TTE Elephant:
TTE Elephant is a pioneering headspa brand that masterfully blends scientific scalp care with a luxurious sensory experience. We specialize in providing modern, results-oriented solutions for scalp rejuvenation, anti-aging, and stress relief. Our sleek, contemporary spaces are designed to deliver a transformative "Headspa Journey." We are looking for passionate individuals who believe in the power of expert scalp health.

The Role:
As a TTE Elephant Headspa Therapist, you are more than a technician—you are a Scalp Diagnostic Expert and Wellness Guide. You will utilize advanced technology to analyze scalp health and perform our signature, multi-step therapeutic rituals. Your expertise will deliver tangible results and an unparalleled experience that keeps clients returning.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Expert Service Delivery & Client Consultation:

    • Master and perform the complete TTE Elephant signature headspa protocol with precision and artistry.

    • Conduct in-depth client consultations using our advanced scalp scanner (follicle microscope) to analyze and diagnose scalp conditions (oiliness, dryness, dandruff, follicle health, hair density).

    • Clearly interpret and explain scan results, building trust and recommending personalized treatment plans.

    • Provide expert aftercare advice and recommend TTE Elephant professional home-care products to support treatment goals.

  • Technical Mastery & Operations:

    • Expertly operate and maintain all professional equipment, including scalp scanners, steamer machines, and high-frequency tools.

    • Uphold the highest standards of sanitation, hygiene, and safety for all tools and treatment areas.

    • Manage appointment bookings, detailed client records, and retail sales using our digital management systems.

    • Maintain an impeccably clean, organized, and on-brand treatment room.

  • Brand Ambassador & Team Contribution:

    • Act as a knowledgeable ambassador for the TTE Elephant philosophy, products, and techniques.

    • Contribute to a positive, high-energy, and collaborative team environment.

    • Actively participate in meeting individual and store targets for service and retail sales.

    • Commit to ongoing training to master new techniques, products, and technologies introduced by the brand.

Requirements & Qualifications:

Mandatory Requirements

  • Minimum of 3-4 years of hands-on experience in a facial/skincare clinic, advanced hair salon, or spa environment. (Direct headspa experience is a strong plus, but not always required if you have strong facial/skincare analysis skills).

  • Exceptional customer service skills with a consultative, detail-oriented approach.

  • Professional appearance, impeccable personal hygiene, and a calm, reassuring demeanor.

  • Ability to stand for extended periods and perform detailed, repetitive hand movements.

The Ideal TTE Elephant Candidate:

  • Has a proven track record in retail sales of professional skincare or haircare products.

  • Is genuinely passionate about holistic wellness, scalp health, and the science behind beauty treatments.

  • Possesses excellent communication skills to explain technical details in a simple, engaging way.

  • Is a quick learner, adaptable, and thrives in a structured, process-driven, and brand-focused environment.

  • Has experience working in a fast-paced, client-focused retail or service setting.

What We Offer:

  • Competitive compensation, Comprehensive, paid training on the TTE Elephant method, technology, and products.

  • Clear career progression paths within a growing, innovative brand.

  • Employee discounts on premium TTE Elephant services and products.

  • A modern, stylish, and supportive work environment.
